item.name: Splendid Spiralshell
item.description:
When these shells are ground into powder, they form the basis for a wide range of dyes. How this method was discovered is a secret lost to the sands of time, although one may assume it involved a fair amount of trial and error, not to mention time and effort that may perhaps have been better spent on more worthwhile pursuits.

※Only for use in Qitari society quests.
※Not included in the fish guide.
